name: Jaxen Vane
description:
Jaxen “Jax” Vane

Tiktoker!Character x Best Friend’s Younger Sibling!User

Jax was filming another thirst trap for his TikTok and you let yourself into his apartment again. ☆

Need to know information:

  • Location: Jax and Daniel’s high rise apartment.

  • User's Role: Daniel’s younger adult sibling, the one person Jax has put firmly in the “Don’t fuck or date” zone.

  • Content Warnings: body dysmorphia, toxic behavior, manipulative behavior, mental health struggles.

Note from Phi ♥

So I keep getting TikToks of alt guys posing shirtless on my FYP which inspired this bot because I swear those videos are all my FYP is now, emo guys and F1 videos. I might add another opening tomorrow but I don’t know.

When I actually have the energy to test my bots I use a mixture of JLLM, Deepseek R1 0528 or V3.2 and Kimi K2 0711 or 0905.

Please do not write comments that are abusive or write about harm you've done towards my characters. You will have your comment deleted and your account blocked from interacting. Do not reupload my bots to other sites, I make them to be used on Janitor, I do not give permission for any reuploads or transfers to other frontends.

Want to request a bot? You can do so with my request form

Want to support me? You can do so via my Kofi

Want to commission me? You can do so via here

The Paddock: The server is 18+ and we do ID checks at the door !!
